title: Build Atropos cycle 1 as a read-only supersession-consistency verifier (deferred-ratification lifecycle)
decision: Implement Atropos cycle-1 as a zero-dependency READ-ONLY verifier over CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded (plan-version consistency NORMATIVE; node-backed retirement deferred as UNREPRESENTABLE; retirement itself remains a human CHANGE-PROTOCOL act). Built FIRST under The Eye's build-mode directive, then ratified by the deferred TELOS council: round 1 NOT_AUTHORIZED (codex: the hashed plan claimed a false docs-first history) -> plan made truthful; round 2 gate-blocked (required contract doc reviewed by no packet) -> contract put before the seats; round 3 four seats revised (contract self-declared NORMATIVE-CURRENT against the plan's RATIFICATION-PENDING mandate; note-field semantics refereed by reality: optional) -> artifacts reconciled; round 4 AUTHORIZED 5/5, gate pass, 0 blockers.
verified: 32 assertions green (golden over the real 4 retirements v11-v14 -> v15 + per-defect negatives + executable read-only oracle); comprehension gate GRANTED with negatives DENIED (docs/runs/atropos-1/reader-validation-artifact.json).
